patterns.rust_meta_update: Use write_meta(&path, &meta) to persist changes to meta.json
patterns.swift_button_pattern: HStack with icon + text, styled with .foregroundColor, .padding, .background, .clipShape
patterns.swift_swiftui_views: SwiftUI views embedded in existing card layout with proper state management
patterns.swift_file_access: Use URL.appendingPathComponent() and Data(contentsOf:) for file reading

existing_implementations.description: Meta struct already has zellij_session and zellij_pane fields; PreviewViewController already has BopCardMeta with matching properties; existing Attach button uses custom bop:// URL scheme
relevant_files: macos/bop/PreviewViewController.swift (lines 23-24 - BopCardMeta fields, lines 800-816 - Attach button)

key_insights.log_file_naming: Spec asks for logs/stdout (no extension), but code uses logs/stdout.log - verify actual file name
key_insights.zellij_web_port: Zellij 0.43+ web client is at http://127.0.0.1:8082/<session-name>
key_insights.pane_naming: Pane name is the card name (variable 'name' in dispatcher)
